setup: 1. Replace receiverAddress with your wallet address (the address that will receive payments)
2. Change network to your preferred chain: 'base', 'base-sepolia', 'ethereum', 'polygon', etc.
3. Adjust prices as needed (denominated in the currency specified)
4. For production, install @coinbase/x402 and configure the facilitator
